title: Hornet Removal in South Orange, NJ | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in South Orange, NJ. Safe, effective nest elimination for $350-$550. Serving homes near Seton Hall and the Village. Call today!
intro: Hornets pose a serious threat to South Orange residents, especially during warmer months when nests become active near homes and businesses. Best Pest Control NYC provides professional hornet removal services throughout South Orange, from the tree-lined streets near Seton Hall University to the historic homes in the Village Center. Our experienced technicians safely eliminate hornet nests and protect your property from future infestations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of expertise to South Orange, combining safe removal techniques with competitive pricing of $350-$550. We understand the unique pest challenges of Essex County properties and respond quickly to protect your family and pets from aggressive hornet colonies.
localContext: South Orange's mature trees and Victorian-era homes provide ideal nesting sites for hornets, particularly in attics, eaves, and large shade trees common throughout neighborhoods like Newstead and Montrose. The proximity to South Mountain Reservation means hornets frequently establish colonies in residential areas, making professional removal essential for homeowner safety.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in South Orange?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day hornet removal service in South Orange. Once you contact us, we'll schedule an appointment within 24 hours in most cases, as we understand the urgency of protecting your family from aggressive hornets.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our service includes complete nest inspection, safe hornet elimination using professional-grade treatments, nest removal when accessible, and a follow-up inspection to ensure complete eradication. The final price depends on nest size, location, and accessibility.

faqs.question: Are hornets common in South Orange, NJ?
faqs.answer: Yes, South Orange's abundant tree coverage and proximity to South Mountain Reservation make it a hotspot for hornet activity, particularly bald-faced hornets and European hornets. Peak season runs from late spring through fall, with nests often found in trees, under eaves, and in attic spaces.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved treatments and follow strict safety protocols during removal. We advise keeping family members and pets indoors during the treatment process, and the area is typically safe within a few hours after service completion.
